authBrand.headline: Keep your moods, memories, and future letters inside a personal constellation of time.
authBrand.description: Heart Cave connects diaries, mood tracking, drift bottles, and AI time-warp conversations into one memory orbit, so you can record the present and revisit who you used to be.
authBrand.featureDiaryDesc: Save today's mood, weather, and story in a timeline that belongs only to you.
authBrand.featureCalendarDesc: Follow emotional rhythms through the mood calendar and notice how they evolve.
authBrand.featureChatDesc: Recall fragments from past diary entries and start a cross-time conversation with your former self.
authBrand.storyValue: A personal memory space that connects self-recording, emotional reflection, and the feeling of time.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Enter your account info to sign in

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Fill in the info below to register
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Record life, keep emotions, let time speak.
dashboard.diaryDesc: Write down today's story and capture every mood and weather.
dashboard.calendarDesc: Track your mood changes with colors and view your streak.
dashboard.driftDesc: Say it anonymously — maybe it will find someone who understands.
dashboard.capsuleDesc: Write to your future self and seal it until the unlock date.

settings.title: Time Archive
settings.subtitle: Your personal memory is preserved here

quote.title: Daily Quote
quote.collectHint: Double-click or tap bookmark to collect
quote.bookEmptyDesc: Go back to the home page and double-click today's quote to start collecting

diary.title: My Diary
diary.noEntries: No diary yet. Write how you feel today!
diary.contentPlaceholder: What happened today? Write it down…
diary.capsuleStillLocked: This time capsule is still sealed
diary.confirmDelete: Delete this entry? This cannot be undone.

drift.title: Drift Bottle
drift.subtitle: Say it anonymously — maybe it will find someone who understands
drift.contentPlaceholder: Write what you want to say… (max 500 chars)
drift.noBottles: No bottles in the sea right now
drift.limitReached: Daily limit reached, come back tomorrow
drift.throwSuccess: Your bottle has been cast to the sea~
drift.pickDesc: You can pick up to 3 bottles per day
drift.pickLimitReached: Daily pick limit reached. Come back tomorrow~

chat.title: AI Time Warp Chat
chat.selectTimeDesc: Choose a past time period to talk to your past self
chat.emptyDesc: Choose a time portal to have a cross-time conversation with your past self
chat.firstMessage: Say something to your past self…
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask your past self something… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
chat.sendHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

coins.accelerateDesc: Open a time capsule 7 days early — satisfy curiosity… but lose the ritual of waiting.
coins.freezeDesc: Delay an about-to-open capsule by 30 days. Not ready to face the past?
coins.rewindDesc: Recall a drift bottle before it gets picked up. One-time regret pill.
coins.seedRevivalDesc: Revive a withered Time Seed and give it another chance. Each seed can only be revived once.
coins.accelerateWarning: You will lose the ritual of waiting. The capsule will open 7 days early. Are you sure?
coins.freezeWarning: The capsule will be delayed 30 days. Still not ready?
coins.rewindWarning: Recall this drift bottle? It will vanish from the sea.

seeds.title: Time Seeds
seeds.subtitle: Plant a seed each day — grow it for 3 days to see it bloom
seeds.noSeedDesc: Plant a seed each day and keep going for 3 days to see it sprout
seeds.sproutedDesc: Your dedication paid off — 10 Time Coins rewarded!
seeds.witherDesc: Use a Time Elixir to revive it
seeds.deadBranchDesc: This seed gave up on day {day}
seeds.deadBranchEmpty: No dead branches yet — keep it up!
seeds.plantModalTaskPlaceholder: What do you want to achieve today? (optional)
seeds.shopRevivalDesc: Revive a withered seed and give it another chance. Each seed can only be revived once.
seeds.noRevivalVoucher: No Time Elixir in your bag
seeds.reviveSuccess: Seed revived! Starting over from day 1 🌱
seeds.alreadyHasSeed: You already have a growing seed
